/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libdingo_peripheral_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libdingo_peripheral_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/dingo_peripheral_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/dingo_peripheral_msgs/msg/detail/electrical_measurements__description.c.o CMakeFiles/dingo_peripheral_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/dingo_peripheral_msgs/msg/detail/electrical_measurements__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/dingo_peripheral_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/dingo_peripheral_msgs/msg/detail/electrical_measurements__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
